name: Shooting Starmon

signature_move.name: Dynamite Soul
signature_move.description: Rekindles the weakened hearts of dispirited Digimon by shouting passionate phrases at them.

description: The Jogress -evolved form of Starmon and the Pickmons . A horde of Pickmons surround Starmon and their thoughts become one, allowing Starmon to ascend to a Super Major-type. Its Special Move is attacking by turning into a flaming star that penetrates the atmosphere ( Astro Bomber ), with such force that it creates a huge crater upon impact. Not only that, it is able to rekindle the weakened hearts of depressed, dispirited Digimon by shouting passionate phrases at them ( Dynamite Soul ). Its " Ryūsei Rock Damashī ", a Combined Special Move with Shoutmon EX6 , is a straight right punch filled with fighting spirit.
